message:
I checked pending submissions across all approval levels just now (source: GetPendingSubmissions) — there are no pending submissions.

Next steps I can take for you:
- Show recent approved submissions (GetApprovedSubmissions)
- Show recent rejections with reasons (GetRejectedSubmissions)
- Provide an overall submissions summary (GetSubmissionsSummary)
- Re-run pending check filtered by ASM or HQ

Which would you like?
